old_value: {"id":"vex-chat-2xp","title":"feat/rn-auth: Post-connection WS auth + device-key auto-login","description":"Two-phase feature to make React Native work end-to-end. Phase 1: ADR-006 post-connection WS auth (unblocks RN connect). Phase 2: ADR-007 device-key challenge-response auto-login (passwordless resumed sessions with 1-hour JWT). Also separates JWT_SECRET from SPK.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-07T23:09:32Z","created_by":"dgill","updated_at":"2026-04-07T23:09:32Z"}

{"id":"vex-chat-dwj","title":"[spire] Replace express-ws with raw ws + noServer","description":"Remove express-ws dependency. Create WebSocketServer({ noServer: true }). Handle HTTP upgrade via server.on('upgrade') → wss.handleUpgrade(). Change initApp() return type from expressWs.Application to express.Application. Remove express-ws and @types/express-ws from deps.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:08Z","created_by":"dgill","updated_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:08Z"}

{"id":"vex-chat-8r7","title":"[libvex] Send auth message on WS open","description":"In initSocket(), on 'open' event send JSON.stringify({ type: 'auth', token: this.token }) as first message. Remove the headers: { Cookie } option from WebSocket constructor. Wait for server to accept auth before proceeding. Same code path for all platforms (Node, browser, Tauri, RN).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:14Z","created_by":"dgill","updated_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:14Z"}

{"id":"vex-chat-9kt","title":"[spire] Separate JWT_SECRET from SPK","description":"Add JWT_SECRET env var for JWT signing. Stop reusing the NaCl server signing key (SPK) for HMAC-SHA256 JWT signatures. Generate with: node -e \"console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(64).toString('hex'))\". Fall back to SPK if JWT_SECRET not set (backward compat). Auth-comparison doc flagged this as a key hygiene concern.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:22Z","created_by":"dgill","updated_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:22Z"}

{"id":"vex-chat-jlr","title":"[spire] Device-key challenge endpoints","description":"Two new routes: POST /auth/device accepts { deviceID, signKey }, looks up device, returns { challenge: hex(nonce) }. POST /auth/device/verify accepts { deviceID, challenge, signed }, verifies Ed25519 signature against stored signKey, issues 1-hour JWT + cookie. Challenge stored in-memory with TTL, single-use, same pattern as action tokens.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:25Z","created_by":"dgill","updated_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:25Z"}

{"id":"vex-chat-tpd","title":"[libvex] Client.loginWithDeviceKey() method","description":"New method that performs the two-step HTTP handshake: POST /auth/device → sign challenge with device private key → POST /auth/device/verify → receive JWT. Sets this.token and cookie. Export from main entrypoint. Used by auto-login when stored credentials have a deviceKey.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:28Z","created_by":"dgill","updated_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:28Z"}

{"id":"vex-chat-yas","title":"[store] autoLogin uses loginWithDeviceKey","description":"In bootstrap.ts autoLogin(), call client.loginWithDeviceKey(creds.deviceID) before connect(). Falls back to login screen if device key is revoked or challenge fails. No password needed, no JWT persisted — device key re-authenticates each app launch.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:30Z","created_by":"dgill","updated_at":"2026-04-07T23:10:30Z"}

{"id":"vex-chat-ps2","title":"[ADR-008] Spire: Bearer-only auth, remove cookies","description":"Replace checkAuth middleware with Bearer-only (Authorization header). Remove cookie-parser dependency. Remove all res.cookie() calls from login, register, goodbye, and device-key auth endpoints. Login response returns { user, token } in body only — no Set-Cookie header.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-08T00:23:30Z","created_by":"dgill","updated_at":"2026-04-08T00:23:30Z"}

{"id":"vex-chat-ajn","title":"[ADR-008] libvex: per-client axios + Bearer headers","description":"Each Client creates its own axios.create() instance instead of using the global ax import. After login/loginWithDeviceKey, set Authorization: Bearer on the per-client instance. Delete addCookie(), getCookies(), this.cookies[], and the isNode check. Remove browser-or-node remnants.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-08T00:23:32Z","created_by":"dgill","updated_at":"2026-04-08T00:23:32Z"}

{"id":"vex-chat-2oe","title":"[ADR-008] Clean up test transports","description":"Remove cookie simulation from platform-transports.ts: delete getAxiosCookies(), remove cookie forwarding from NodeTestWS and BrowserTestWS constructors, remove cookie-jar comments. All three transports become identical (bare WebSocket, no auth headers — post-connection auth handles everything).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-08T00:23:35Z","created_by":"dgill","updated_at":"2026-04-08T00:23:35Z"}
